title: Jedi Purge (disambiguation)
content:
'''Jedi Purge''' refers to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Great Jedi Purge]]''', [[Darth Sidious]]' act intended to exterminate the [[Jedi]].
*'''[[Destruction of the Jedi Temple]]''', an event that took place during the [[New Republic Era]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[First Jedi Purge]] ([[3954 BBY]]–[[3951 BBY]])
*[[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] ([[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]–[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]])
*[[Third Jedi Purge]] ([[130 ABY]]—[[138 ABY]])

{{Disambig}}
